headline: Fifth Third Launches Small Towns & Small Cities Initiative to Advance Community & Economic Development
summary: LIMA, Ohio, March 19, 2026--Lima, OH is the inaugural city in Fifth Third’s new Small Towns & Small Cities initiative to advance place-based community & economic development.
